theme: Cyclic string covering the most necklaces
title: Rotation-Free Ribbon: Necklace-Class Coverage
strategies: constant-symbol baseline: repeat a single character (always feasible, exactly 1 necklace class, this is also the checker's own internal baseline)

substring-maximizing greedy walk: a de-Bruijn-style linear walk that greedily avoids repeating any exact k-length SUBSTRING, unaware that many of the substrings it visits are cyclic rotations of each other (same necklace, wasted length)

necklace-canonical packing: enumerate lexicographically-minimal-rotation (Lyndon-style) representatives of distinct necklaces and concatenate them back-to-back with zero overlap, so every aligned window buys one guaranteed-fresh necklace class
ordering / rotation-choice refinements on top of canonical packing to also harvest bonus coverage from the boundary-crossing windows
